name: github-workflow
description: GitHub issue and pull request workflow skills for Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Manage GitHub issues, PRs, reviews, CI checks, and branch updates.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native GitHub workflow plugin for issue planning and implementation, issue creation and compaction, pull request lifecycle management, PR review, CI checking, rebasing, and switching to main.
defaultPrompt: Create a PR for the current changes.
Review this pull request and post findings.
Plan implementation for this GitHub issue.
